seo_title: Safari Journeys in the Maasai Mara | Exploreans Mara River Camp
seo_description: Explore the untouched wilderness of the Maasai Mara with Exploreans Mara River Camp. Experience raw, authentic safari journeys where nature leads and memories endure.
name: Mara River Camp
tagline: Tented. Riverside. Close enough to the migration to hear it cross.
description: A classic tented camp on the banks of the Mara River — positioned in the path of one of the greatest seasonal movements of life on earth. Expect canvas walls that breathe, wide verandas, a fire each night, and a cup of coffee handed to you before sunrise, wordlessly.
image_alt: A safari vehicle traveling along a dusty track through the acacia-lined savanna at Exploreans Mara River Camp in the Maasai Mara, Kenya
